params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include. Supported values are authors and tags.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return in the response.

params.name: filter
params.description: Apply fine-grained filters using Ghost's NQL query language.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of resources to return per page. Defaults to 15.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for paginated results. Defaults to 1.

params.name: order
params.description: Field and direction to order results by.

params.name: formats
params.description: Comma-separated list of content formats to include in the response.

items.docs: Retrieve a paginated list of posts with all statuses including draft, scheduled, and published. Supports filtering, ordering, and including related resources.

Create a new post. The title field is required, all other fields are optional and will have defaults applied. Content can be provided in Lexical or HTML format. Tags can be specified by name or as full tag objects. If a tag does not exist, it will be created automatically.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include. Supported values are authors and tags.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return in the response.

params.name: formats
params.description: Comma-separated list of content formats to include in the response.

items.docs: Retrieve a single post by its unique identifier, including draft and scheduled posts.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

items.docs: Update an existing post. The updated_at field must be sent with the current value to prevent update collisions. Only the fields being changed need to be included in the request body, along with updated_at.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

items.docs: Permanently delete a post by its unique identifier.

items.docs: Retrieve a paginated list of publication members. Supports filtering by status, label, newsletter subscription, and other member properties.
Create a new member. The email field is required. Optionally include name, labels, and newsletter subscriptions.

Upload an image file to the Ghost publication. The image is uploaded as multipart form data and the response includes the URL where the image can be accessed.
